XMLElement.comments: Client for which object was generated
XMLElement.name: CLIENT

XMLElement.comments: Time a spool request was created
XMLElement.name: CRTIME

XMLElement.comments: TemSe: Number of add protection rule
XMLElement.name: SPOPAGES

XMLElement.comments: Spool: No. output requests for spool request total
XMLElement.name: PJTOTAL

XMLElement.comments: Spool: Number of output requests with problems
XMLElement.name: PJPROBLEM

XMLElement.comments: Spool: Number of output requests with errors (no printout)
XMLElement.name: PJERROR

XMLElement.comments: TemSe: Number of the part of a TemSe object
XMLElement.name: TEMSEPART

XMLElement.comments: Client for which object was generated
XMLElement.name: TEMSECLIENT

XMLElement.comments: Last time a spool request was changed
XMLElement.name: MODTIME

XMLElement.comments: Spool: Long name of printers for host spooler
XMLElement.name: OSNAME

XMLElement.comments: Spool: Output lines of a format type
XMLElement.name: LINES

XMLElement.comments: Spool: Output columns of a format type
XMLElement.name: COLUMNS

XMLElement.comments: TemSe: Number of parts of a TemSe object
XMLElement.name: TMSPARTS

XMLElement.comments: Program name in internal step list
XMLElement.name: PROGRAM

XMLElement.comments: Identification of step as ABAP, ext. command or program
XMLElement.name: TYP

XMLElement.comments: Background User Name for Authorization Check
XMLElement.name: AUTHCKNAM

XMLElement.comments: ID of batch job output list in the spool
XMLElement.name: LISTIDENT

XMLElement.comments: Target System to Run Background Job
XMLElement.name: XPGTGTSYS

XMLElement.comments: Status of step in background processing
XMLElement.name: STATUS

XMLElement.comments: Control flag for external program (e.g. trace level)
XMLElement.name: CONNCNTL

XMLElement.comments: Control flag for external program (e.g. trace level)
XMLElement.name: STDINCNTL

XMLElement.comments: Control flag for external program (e.g. trace level)
XMLElement.name: STDOUTCNTL

XMLElement.comments: Control flag for external program (e.g. trace level)
XMLElement.name: STDERRCNTL

XMLElement.comments: Control flag for external program (e.g. trace level)
XMLElement.name: TRACECNTL

XMLElement.comments: Control flag for external program (e.g. trace level)
XMLElement.name: TERMCNTL

XMLElement.comments: Print: Check sum for print and archiving parameters
XMLElement.name: PRCHK

XMLElement.comments: SAP ArchiveLink: Object type of business object
XMLElement.name: SAP_OBJECT

XMLElement.comments: SAP ArchiveLink: RPC service / RFC destination
XMLElement.name: RPC_SERVIC

XMLElement.comments: SAP ArchiveLink: Name of communication connection component
XMLElement.name: INTERFACE

XMLElement.comments: Print: Check sum for print and archiving parameters
XMLElement.name: ACHECK
